creator: sheldonh@uunet.co.za
text:
The xpilot port's DESCR file does not include the package's
	home page URL. Adding it would make it easier for folks to find
	out about available servers, name registrations etc.

Fix: The following diff adds a home page URL field to the xpilot
	port's package description file.
How-To-Repeat: 
	N/A
